name: notion
description: Reads Notion databases, pages, and users through the Notion REST API. Read-only.

risk.read: external Notion API read of workspace databases/pages/users

conformance.reason: The databases/pages streams are StreamHook-handled (hooks/notion/hooks.go ports legacy's POST /search body-cursor pagination verbatim; the engine's declarative read path always issues a nil request body -- StreamSpec.Body is declared but never read by engine/read.go -- so a body-carried start_cursor/filter cannot be expressed declaratively at all, see docs.md's Streams notes and docs/migration/quarantine.json's notion ENGINE_GAP entry). The users stream's GET /users query-cursor pagination IS declarative-expressible, but is also routed through the same StreamHook for a single consistent dispatch path across the bundle (docs.md Known limits). hook-covered; proven live by internal/connectors/paritytest/notion (TestParityNotion_DatabasesSearchBodyCursorPagination) and internal/connectors/hooks/notion/hooks_test.go.
